notes: Version compatibility contract between openclaw-onboarding and blackceo-command-center. fleet-refresh.sh reads pinnedTag (or resolves latest >= minVersion when pinnedTag is null) and checks out that tag. The skill-32 installer refuses to clone a CC older than minVersion. CI fails if onboardingVersion != /version or if pinnedTag < minVersion. v11.19.0 adds self-service add+wire (roles/SOPs/personas + converge); requires CC v4.39.0 for /api/system/converge endpoint. Skill 48 (facebook-ad-generator) lands ad runs on the Kanban board via the producer-side caller scripts/cc_board.py, which requires the POST/PATCH /api/ad-campaigns endpoints introduced in CC v4.50.0 (merge 89b6d5e); minVersion + pinnedTag are bumped to v4.50.0 so fleet-refresh + the skill-32 installer guarantee the endpoint is present. The board hookup is FAIL-SOFT: on a CC older than minVersion (or an unreachable board) the run degrades to ungrouped cards and logs it (INSTALL.md graceful degradation), it never fails an ad job. If CC is older, converge falls back to on-box seed-workspaces.py + ingest-sop-library.sh (graceful degradation, §1.6 step 5). v16.2.4 bumps minVersion + pinnedTag to v4.56.1 (current CC release as of 2026-06-29; fixes fleet-refresh deploying stale CC v4.50.0 to every box). v16.4.0 registers Skill 50 (email-engine): the Email Engine lands DRAFT-ONLY email jobs on the existing marketing Kanban lane via the Command Center's existing task/board endpoints and the Skill-44 Convert & Flow deploy handoff — it introduces NO new CC endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change, so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). The board hookup is FAIL-SOFT: on an unreachable board the run degrades to a local draft plan and logs it, it never fails an email job. Nothing is sent without explicit human approval. v16.5.0 registers Skill 49 (signature-funnel): the Signature Funnel AUTHORS the SACRED 12-section Hero copy + the per-section image prompts inside its own fail-closed pipeline, then DELEGATES image generation to Skill 47 and ALL GoHighLevel media + funnel/page build to Skill 6 (the ONE GHL delivery rail) via Skill 6's EXISTING REST canvas / builder + media endpoints; a 'signature funnel' request routes to it through the new shared STEP-0 funnel-engine selector registry in Skill 6 (06-ghl-install-pages/funnel-engines/registry.json). It introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change (funnel jobs ride the existing web-development / QC Kanban lanes, fail-soft), so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Publish is human-approved (preview URLs + labeled ~/Downloads bundle only); nothing is published without explicit human approval.
